Title: A Comprehensive Study on Large Language Models for Mutation Testing
Venue: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology
Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been used to generate mutants both in the research community and in industrial practice. However, there has been no comprehensive empirical study of their performance for this increasingly important LLM-based Software Engineering application. To address this, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study evaluating both a wide range of traditional approaches and LLM-based approaches.
